title: oxytropis revoluta var. kudoana
intro: Oxytropis revoluta var. kudoana, also known as Japanese mountain milkvetch, is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oxytropis revoluta var. kudoana include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce cholesterol levels, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's roots and stems are typically dried and made into teas or infusions to utilize its medicinal properties.
